workflowSurfaces.title: Staff Navigation
workflowSurfaces.note: Alerts destinations were not exposed and literal drift was present in staff shortcuts.

workflowSurfaces.title: Admin User Management
workflowSurfaces.note: The primary user-management card linked to `/users`, which had no canonical route.

workflowSurfaces.title: Alerts Workspace
workflowSurfaces.note: Alerts state existed, but routed overview/history/instances surfaces were not exposed.

workflowSurfaces.title: Dashboard Volunteer Widget
workflowSurfaces.note: The quick action pointed to `/volunteers/assignments/new`, which required missing context.

workflowSurfaces.title: Portal Navigation
workflowSurfaces.note: Portal links worked but were maintained separately from canonical route metadata.

runtimeAudit.reason: Targeted Playwright route-health and navigation-link audits were rerun successfully on April 5, 2026 in this execution environment.
verifiedCommands: cd e2e && npx playwright test tests/link-health.spec.ts --project=chromium
cd e2e && npx playwright test tests/navigation-links.spec.ts --project=chromium

workflowSurfaces.title: Staff Navigation
workflowSurfaces.note: Navigation and utility links are catalog-driven and validated by route-integrity checks.

workflowSurfaces.title: Admin User Management
workflowSurfaces.note: The card now routes to `/settings/admin/users` and the admin side-nav uses the route catalog.

workflowSurfaces.title: Alerts Workspace
workflowSurfaces.note: Configuration, triggered alerts, and history routes now share a consistent shell with cross-links.

workflowSurfaces.title: Dashboard Volunteer Widget
workflowSurfaces.note: The shortcut now routes to the volunteer management surface instead of a dead-end create page.

workflowSurfaces.title: Portal Navigation
workflowSurfaces.note: Portal navigation now consumes the shared route catalog and aligns with the shared shell.
